subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down by the Wronged One - He Who, at every moment, hath been sacrificed in the path of God, the Lord of the worlds - hath indeed come unto Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم الذی ذبح فی کل حین فی سبیل الله رب العالمین قد ورد علینا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God
